title: Implement MC JWT validation using common JwksClient (task 9)
body:
## Summary
- Add `McJwtValidator` thin wrapper around `common::jwt::JwtValidator` for MC-specific token validation
- `validate_meeting_token()` with `token_type == "meeting"` enforcement (prevents token confusion)
- `validate_guest_token()` with `GuestTokenClaims::validate()` field enforcement
- `From<JwtError> for McError` error mapping (ServiceUnavailable->Internal, others->JwtValidation)
- `ac_jwks_url` config with smart default from `AC_ENDPOINT` (no deployment manifest changes needed)
- Wired into MC startup as `Arc<McJwtValidator>` for task 10 consumption
- 10+ new tests: config, error mapping (7 variants), token validation with wiremock + Ed25519, token confusion tests

## Review
- Security: RESOLVED (1 finding fixed: debug log for guest field validation)
- Test: RESOLVED (2 findings fixed: token_type guard test, bidirectional confusion test)
- Observability: RESOLVED (2 findings fixed: warn on rejection paths, INDEX update)
- Code Quality: RESOLVED (2 findings fixed: #[expect] annotation, tracing)
- DRY: CLEAR (follows GC thin wrapper pattern exactly)
- Operations: CLEAR (ac_jwks_url defaults from AC_ENDPOINT, no crash-loop risk)

## Test plan
- [x] `cargo check --workspace` passes
- [x] `cargo fmt --all -- --check` passes
- [x] `cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings` passes
- [x] All workspace tests pass (176 MC lib + 13 integration)
- [x] Guards: 14/14 pass
- [x] Semantic guard: PASS
- [ ] Verify MC can start with only AC_ENDPOINT set (derives JWKS URL)
- [ ] Verify token confusion: guest token rejected by validate_meeting_token
